# worldToMetersConversionScale

**Instance Property**

The scale factor to meters from the world coordinate system containing the camera.

## Declaration

```swift
var worldToMetersConversionScale: Float { get set }
```

## Discussion

Some calculations, such as the calculation of [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLStereoscopicCamera] view matrices, must occur in world space. [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLCamera] properties measured in meters or millimeters use this conversion scale to perform the calculation.

The default value is 1.0.

## Managing Camera Perspective

- **projectionMatrix**: A transformation matrix that determines the extent of a scene visible to the camera.
- **projection**: The style of projection transform used by the camera.
- **MDLCameraProjection**: Options for camera projection styles, used by the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLCamera/projection] property.
- **nearVisibilityDistance**: The camera’s near depth limit.
- **farVisibilityDistance**: The camera’s far depth limit.
- **fieldOfView**: The camera’s field of view, in degrees.
- **ray(to:forViewPort:)**: Returns a point, in 3D world coordinates, corresponding to the specified 2D view coordinates.
